overview.title: Behaviour-Driven Exfiltration Detection
overview.subtitle: Control data flows, training, model publishing, and analytic explanations from a single workspace.

dataUpload.title: Data Upload
dataUpload.subtitle: Load raw files from local folders, track transfer progress, and edit contents before dataset registration.

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.subtitle: Bind already uploaded raw files to managed dataset records, select feature families, and keep the registry consistent.

autoTraining.title: Automatic preparation and training
autoTraining.subtitle: Upload archives, automatically prepare a dataset, and run the full model training flow without manual data assembly.

training.title: Sequential Model Training
training.subtitle: Link normalized datasets with feature schemas, review sequence settings, and launch hybrid training inside a single operating contour.

models.title: Model Artifact Publishing
models.subtitle: Review artifacts, compare status and metrics, and promote the required model into an operational state.

inference.title: Published Model Evaluation
inference.subtitle: Submit compact feature bundles, track jobs, and review results in one interface.

explanations.title: SHAP Explanation Generation
explanations.subtitle: Link published models with detection results and receive ranked feature contributions.

logs.title: Structured Application Logs
logs.subtitle: Inspect JSONL logs, filter operational events, and review failures without opening raw files.

users.title: Platform Accounts
users.subtitle: Create and review local administrator and analyst accounts.

state.title: Operational status
state.subtitle: Key platform entities and the current state of active processes in a single view.

upload.subtitle: Load raw files from a local directory into the platform workspace.

archives.subtitle: Manage the archives that will be used for automatic dataset preparation.

jobs.subtitle: Track archive extraction, normalization, and model training in one list.

newRun.subtitle: Hybrid training of sequential models with late fusion

history.subtitle: Candidate models remain separated until promotion
